requirement_topic.en: KUCAS Conformity Scheme — Technical Evaluation Report + Per-Shipment Certificate of Conformity (PAI)
requirement_topic.zh: KUCAS符合性方案——技术评估报告 + 逐批货物符合性证书（PAI）
requirement_topic.zht: KUCAS符合性方案——技術評估報告 + 逐批貨物符合性證書（PAI）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances are regulated products under KUCAS (Kuwait Conformity Assurance Scheme), the mandatory conformity programme run by the Public Authority for Industry (PAI). To place refrigerators on the Kuwait market the manufacturer/importer must obtain: (1) a Technical Evaluation Report (TER) / type registration confirming the product meets the applicable GSO standards (safety to GSO IEC 60335-2-24, EMC to GSO CISPR 14, energy efficiency to the GSO MEPS, and the GSO energy label); and (2) a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity (CoC) issued before each consignment, which customs requires to release goods at the ports (Shuwaikh, Shuaiba). The TER is supported by accredited (ISO/IEC 17025) test reports and the registered importer's documentation. There is no single self-declared mark equivalent to CE — KUCAS is a third-party conformity scheme operated through PAI-recognised conformity assessment bodies. Appliances must be rated for the Kuwait 240 V, 50 Hz grid.
summary.zh: 家用制冷器具属于KUCAS（科威特符合性保证方案）下的受监管产品，KUCAS是由工业公共管理局（PAI）运行的强制性符合性计划。要将电冰箱投放科威特市场，制造商/进口商须取得：（1）技术评估报告（TER）/型式注册，确认产品符合适用的GSO标准（安全符合GSO IEC 60335-2-24、电磁兼容符合GSO CISPR 14、能效符合GSO MEPS及GSO能效标签）；以及（2）每批货物在出货前签发的逐批货物符合性证书（CoC），海关凭此在口岸（舒维赫、舒艾巴）放行货物。TER以认可（ISO/IEC 17025）检测报告及注册进口商的文件为支撑。不存在等同于CE的单一自我声明标识——KUCAS是通过PAI认可的合格评定机构运行的第三方符合性方案。器具须按科威特240 V、50 Hz电网标定。
summary.zht: 家用製冷器具屬於KUCAS（科威特符合性保證方案）下的受監管產品，KUCAS是由工業公共管理局（PAI）運行的強制性符合性計畫。要將電冰箱投放科威特市場，製造商/進口商須取得：（1）技術評估報告（TER）/型式註冊，確認產品符合適用的GSO標準（安全符合GSO IEC 60335-2-24、電磁相容符合GSO CISPR 14、能效符合GSO MEPS及GSO能效標籤）；以及（2）每批貨物在出貨前簽發的逐批貨物符合性證書（CoC），海關憑此在口岸（舒維赫、舒艾巴）放行貨物。TER以認可（ISO/IEC 17025）檢測報告及註冊進口商的文件為支撐。不存在等同於CE的單一自我聲明標識——KUCAS是通過PAI認可的合格評定機構運行的第三方符合性方案。器具須按科威特240 V、50 Hz電網標定。

standards_or_laws: KUCAS (Kuwait Conformity Assurance Scheme) — Public Authority for Industry (PAI), Kuwait — mandatory conformity scheme for regulated products
Technical Evaluation Report (TER) / type registration — confirms conformity to applicable GSO standards
Per-shipment Certificate of Conformity (CoC) — required by Kuwait customs for release at Shuwaikh / Shuaiba
GSO IEC 60335-2-24 (safety), GSO IEC CISPR 14 (EMC), GSO refrigerator energy-efficiency standard (MEPS + label) — underlying GSO standards
ISO/IEC 17025 accredited test reports — evidence basis

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering both safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale, plus the China Energy Label (based on GB 12021.2) for energy. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies (CABs); it is issued per product type, not per shipment, and there is no per-consignment certificate-of-conformity requirement at the point of domestic sale. The CCC mark and China Energy Label are the domestic market-access instruments — they are entirely separate from KUCAS and are not recognised by PAI as evidence for the Technical Evaluation Report or the per-shipment CoC.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在销售前须取得中国强制认证（CCC），涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1），并须取得能效方面的中国能效标识（基于GB 12021.2）。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定认证机构（CAB）审核；其按产品型式而非按批次签发，国内销售环节不存在逐批货物的符合性证书要求。CCC标志和中国能效标识是国内市场准入工具——与KUCAS完全独立，且不被PAI承认为技术评估报告或逐批货物符合性证书的证据。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在銷售前須取得中國強制認證（CCC），涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1），並須取得能效方面的中國能效標識（基於GB 12021.2）。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定認證機構（CAB）審核；其按產品型式而非按批次簽發，國內銷售環節不存在逐批貨物的符合性證書要求。CCC標誌和中國能效標識是國內市場准入工具——與KUCAS完全獨立，且不被PAI承認為技術評估報告或逐批貨物符合性證書的證據。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR; issued per product type, not per shipment
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must build a complete KUCAS package — CCC and the China Energy Label do not substitute for any KUCAS requirement: (1) Technical Evaluation Report — obtained through a PAI-recognised conformity assessment body, supported by accredited test reports mapped to the GSO IEC 60335-2-24 (safety), GSO CISPR 14 (EMC), and GSO energy standards, all rated for 240 V / 50 Hz; (2) Per-shipment Certificate of Conformity — a distinctive feature of KUCAS with no Chinese domestic analogue; each consignment needs a CoC before customs release, so logistics and certification must be coordinated per shipment; (3) GSO energy label (Arabic); (4) Registered Kuwait importer (see row frigkw-market-002) to file the KUCAS documentation and clear goods. CNAS/CCC reports may need re-issuance or recognition by the KUCAS conformity body before they can feed the TER.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须建立完整的KUCAS文件包——CCC和中国能效标识不能替代任何KUCAS要求：（1）技术评估报告——通过PAI认可的合格评定机构取得，以对应GSO IEC 60335-2-24（安全）、GSO CISPR 14（电磁兼容）及GSO能效标准并按240 V / 50 Hz标定的认可检测报告为支撑；（2）逐批货物符合性证书——KUCAS的标志性特征，中国国内无对应制度；每批货物在海关放行前均须取得CoC，故须按批次协调物流与认证；（3）GSO能效标签（阿拉伯文）；（4）注册的科威特进口商（详见frigkw-market-002行），负责提交KUCAS文件并清关。CNAS/CCC报告在纳入TER前可能需要由KUCAS合格评定机构重新签发或予以承认。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須建立完整的KUCAS文件包——CCC和中國能效標識不能替代任何KUCAS要求：（1）技術評估報告——通過PAI認可的合格評定機構取得，以對應GSO IEC 60335-2-24（安全）、GSO CISPR 14（電磁相容）及GSO能效標準並按240 V / 50 Hz標定的認可檢測報告為支撐；（2）逐批貨物符合性證書——KUCAS的標誌性特徵，中國國內無對應制度；每批貨物在海關放行前均須取得CoC，故須按批次協調物流與認證；（3）GSO能效標籤（阿拉伯文）；（4）註冊的科威特進口商（詳見frigkw-market-002行），負責提交KUCAS文件並清關。CNAS/CCC報告在納入TER前可能需要由KUCAS合格評定機構重新簽發或予以承認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report plus a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity are required before customs release at Shuwaikh / Shuaiba; no self-declared CE-equivalent route exists
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China; issued per product type, not per shipment

source.publisher: Public Authority for Industry (PAI) — KUCAS, Kuwait

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] KUCAS (PAI) is the mandatory market-access gate for refrigerators in Kuwait: a Technical Evaluation Report plus a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity are required, the latter for each consignment before customs release. Chinese CCC and the China Energy Label do not substitute — all KUCAS documentation must be built through a PAI-recognised conformity assessment body, mapped to GSO standards and the 240 V / 50 Hz rating.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] KUCAS（PAI）是电冰箱进入科威特市场的强制性门槛：须取得技术评估报告及逐批货物符合性证书，后者须在每批货物海关放行前取得。中国CCC和中国能效标识不能替代——所有KUCAS文件须通过PAI认可的合格评定机构建立，并对应GSO标准及240 V / 50 Hz额定值。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] KUCAS（PAI）是電冰箱進入科威特市場的強制性門檻：須取得技術評估報告及逐批貨物符合性證書，後者須在每批貨物海關放行前取得。中國CCC和中國能效標識不能替代——所有KUCAS文件須通過PAI認可的合格評定機構建立，並對應GSO標準及240 V / 50 Hz額定值。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer of Record — Kuwait Customs Clearance and KUCAS File Holder
requirement_topic.zh: 本地进口记录商——科威特海关清关与KUCAS文件保管方
requirement_topic.zht: 本地進口記錄商——科威特海關清關與KUCAS文件保管方

summary.en: Goods entering Kuwait must be imported by a locally established importer of record holding a valid Kuwait commercial registration and import licence. For regulated products such as household refrigerators, this in-country importer is the responsible party that: (1) files the KUCAS documentation with PAI and is named on the Technical Evaluation Report and per-shipment Certificate of Conformity; (2) clears the consignment through Kuwait customs at the ports (Shuwaikh, Shuaiba); (3) is responsible for the GSO/Kuwait Arabic energy label being applied before sale; and (4) is the point of contact for market surveillance and any corrective action. A foreign manufacturer cannot place goods on the Kuwait market directly without a Kuwait-established importer (or an appointed local agent). CITRA registration applies separately only if the appliance includes radio/wireless functions; routine refrigerators without wireless do not require CITRA.
summary.zh: 进入科威特的货物须由本地设立、持有有效科威特商业登记和进口许可的进口记录商进口。对于家用电冰箱等受监管产品，该本地进口商为责任方，须：（1）向PAI提交KUCAS文件，并在技术评估报告和逐批货物符合性证书上具名；（2）在口岸（舒维赫、舒艾巴）为货物办理科威特海关清关；（3）负责在销售前加贴GSO/科威特阿拉伯文能效标签；（4）作为市场监管及任何纠正措施的联系点。外国制造商若无科威特设立的进口商（或委任的本地代理），不能直接将货物投放科威特市场。仅当器具含无线电/无线功能时才另需CITRA注册；不含无线功能的常规电冰箱无需CITRA。
summary.zht: 進入科威特的貨物須由本地設立、持有有效科威特商業登記和進口許可的進口記錄商進口。對於家用電冰箱等受監管產品，該本地進口商為責任方，須：（1）向PAI提交KUCAS文件，並在技術評估報告和逐批貨物符合性證書上具名；（2）在口岸（舒維赫、舒艾巴）為貨物辦理科威特海關清關；（3）負責在銷售前加貼GSO/科威特阿拉伯文能效標籤；（4）作為市場監管及任何糾正措施的聯繫點。外國製造商若無科威特設立的進口商（或委任的本地代理），不能直接將貨物投放科威特市場。僅當器具含無線電/無線功能時才另需CITRA註冊；不含無線功能的常規電冰箱無需CITRA。

standards_or_laws: Kuwait import licensing — locally established importer of record with valid commercial registration and import licence required for customs clearance
KUCAS (PAI) — importer named on the Technical Evaluation Report and per-shipment Certificate of Conformity, responsible for labelling and market-surveillance cooperation
Kuwait customs clearance at Shuwaikh / Shuaiba ports
CITRA registration — applies only if the appliance includes radio/wireless functionality

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent requiring an export manufacturer to designate a destination-country importer of record as a statutory compliance party. Chinese export manufacturers typically appoint overseas distributors or trading companies on a commercial basis. Under the CCC domestic regime, the certification holder is the responsible party for domestic-market compliance — this role does not extend to or satisfy Kuwait's importer-of-record and KUCAS file-holder obligations.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定，要求出口制造商指定目的国进口记录商作为法定合规方。中国出口制造商通常以商业形式委任海外经销商或贸易公司。在CCC国内制度下，认证持有人为国内市场合规的责任方——该角色不延伸至科威特的进口记录商及KUCAS文件保管义务，亦不能满足后者。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定，要求出口製造商指定目的國進口記錄商作為法定合規方。中國出口製造商通常以商業形式委任海外經銷商或貿易公司。在CCC國內制度下，認證持有人為國內市場合規的責任方——該角色不延伸至科威特的進口記錄商及KUCAS文件保管義務，亦不能滿足後者。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent for the Kuwait importer-of-record / KUCAS file-holder obligation

gap.en: This is a structural gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue. A Chinese refrigerator manufacturer cannot ship to Kuwait without a locally established importer of record who holds the import licence, is named on the KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report and per-shipment Certificate of Conformity, and is accountable for the GSO/Kuwait Arabic energy label and any post-market corrective action. The importer must be appointed and its details embedded in the KUCAS file before the first consignment leaves China; logistics routes through Shuwaikh or Shuaiba. If the refrigerator includes Wi-Fi/Bluetooth, separate CITRA radio approval is also required; a basic non-wireless refrigerator does not trigger CITRA.
gap.zh: 这是一个在中国监管体系中没有类似规定的结构性差距。中国电冰箱制造商若无本地设立的进口记录商，不能向科威特发货；该进口商须持有进口许可、在KUCAS技术评估报告和逐批货物符合性证书上具名，并对GSO/科威特阿拉伯文能效标签及任何上市后纠正措施负责。进口商须在首批货物离开中国前委任完毕，并将其信息嵌入KUCAS文件；物流经舒维赫或舒艾巴口岸。若电冰箱含Wi-Fi/蓝牙，还须另行取得CITRA无线电批准；基本的非无线电冰箱不触发CITRA。
gap.zht: 這是一個在中國監管體系中沒有類似規定的結構性差距。中國電冰箱製造商若無本地設立的進口記錄商，不能向科威特發貨；該進口商須持有進口許可、在KUCAS技術評估報告和逐批貨物符合性證書上具名，並對GSO/科威特阿拉伯文能效標籤及任何上市後糾正措施負責。進口商須在首批貨物離開中國前委任完畢，並將其資訊嵌入KUCAS文件；物流經舒維赫或舒艾巴口岸。若電冰箱含Wi-Fi/藍牙，還須另行取得CITRA無線電批准；基本的非無線電冰箱不觸發CITRA。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a locally established importer of record is required for customs clearance and to hold the KUCAS file; CITRA registration applies only if the appliance has radio/wireless functionality
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation to appoint a destination-country importer of record under Chinese law

source.publisher: Public Authority for Industry (PAI) — KUCAS, Kuwait

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Kuwait-established importer of record is a hard gate: goods cannot clear customs at Shuwaikh/Shuaiba or be placed on the Kuwait market without one, and the importer must be named on the KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report and per-shipment Certificate of Conformity and be responsible for the GSO/Kuwait Arabic energy label. China has no equivalent obligation, so this must be arranged before the first shipment. CITRA approval is additionally required only for wireless-enabled models.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 科威特设立的进口记录商是强制性门槛：无此进口商则货物不能在舒维赫/舒艾巴口岸清关或投放科威特市场，且进口商须在KUCAS技术评估报告和逐批货物符合性证书上具名，并负责GSO/科威特阿拉伯文能效标签。中国无对应义务，故须在首批发货前安排妥当。仅含无线功能的型号才另需CITRA批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 科威特設立的進口記錄商是強制性門檻：無此進口商則貨物不能在舒維赫/舒艾巴口岸清關或投放科威特市場，且進口商須在KUCAS技術評估報告和逐批貨物符合性證書上具名，並負責GSO/科威特阿拉伯文能效標籤。中國無對應義務，故須在首批發貨前安排妥當。僅含無線功能的型號才另需CITRA批准。
